moves.name: Ember
moves.description: A weak but reliable flame attack.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.description: A powerful fire blast. May cause burn.

moves.name: Inferno
moves.description: Maximum fire damage. High risk, high reward.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.description: A steady stream of water. Never misses.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description: A massive wave that crashes into the opponent.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.description: The strongest water move. Slightly unreliable.

moves.name: Thunder Shock
moves.description: A small jolt of electricity. Always connects.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.description: A strong bolt. May stun the opponent.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.description: Maximum electric power. Can stun on impact.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: A basic body slam. Reliable but weak.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: A sharp cutting strike. High precision.

moves.name: Hyper Beam
moves.description: The strongest normal move. The best in class.
